helper_functions.name: parseMetadataFromFileName
helper_functions.description: Extracts DS, DT, anno, cmp from filename using regex pattern.
use_cases: Extract metadata from a file name
Parse DS and DT from input files

helper_functions.name: executionMetadata
helper_functions.description: Returns current anno (year) and dt (YYMMDD) based on workflow start or analysis_date param.
use_cases: Get the current execution year and date
Generate a timestamp for the workflow run

helper_functions.name: taskMemory
helper_functions.description: Dynamic memory management with retry scaling (1x → 3x → max).
use_cases: Allocate dynamic memory for a task
Scale memory automatically on task retry

helper_functions.name: taskTime
helper_functions.description: Dynamic time management with retry scaling (1x → max).
use_cases: Allocate dynamic time limit for a task
Increase time limit automatically on task retry

helper_functions.name: getRisCd
helper_functions.description: Generates RISCD unique identifier from metadata, execution context, step, and method.
use_cases: Generate a unique RISCD for a step
Create an identifier based on metadata and step

helper_functions.name: extractKey
helper_functions.description: Extracts DS prefix (e.g., DS123) from filename for cross-join operations.
use_cases: Extract a sample ID or DS prefix for grouping files
Get a cross-join key from a filename string

helper_functions.name: stepInputs
helper_functions.description: Generates structured metadata JSON including input, riscd, meta, and params.
helper_functions.usage: def jsonStr = stepInputs(riscd, md, ex, step, method, opt)
use_cases: Generate a metadata JSON for a workflow step
Structure input files and parameters as a JSON object

helper_functions.name: extractDsRef
helper_functions.description: Extracts DS and reference suffix (e.g., DS123-refA) from filename.
use_cases: Extract sample ID and its specific reference from a filename string

helper_functions.name: getBaseName
helper_functions.description: Removes file extension from a filename.
use_cases: Get the base name of a file without its extension

helper_functions.name: getGB
helper_functions.description: Attempts to locate matching .gb file for a given FASTA reference; returns empty file if not found.
use_cases: Find the corresponding GenBank file for a FASTA reference

helper_functions.name: getEmpty
helper_functions.description: Returns a reference to a static empty file placeholder.
use_cases: Get a placeholder when a required file is missing to prevent errors

helper_functions.name: parseRISCD
helper_functions.description: Parses a RISCD string into structured components (dt, ds, acc, met, ref).
use_cases: Break down a RISCD string into its individual metadata components

helper_functions.name: isFastqRiscd
helper_functions.description: Checks if a RISCD corresponds to FASTQ data (accession starts with '0SQ').
use_cases: Determine if a step generates or uses FASTQ data based on its RISCD

helper_functions.name: isFastaRiscd
helper_functions.description: Checks if a RISCD corresponds to FASTA data (accession starts with '2AS').
use_cases: Determine if a step generates or uses FASTA data based on its RISCD

helper_functions.name: isSpeciesSupported
helper_functions.description: Validates if a genus/species is in a provided whitelist (case-insensitive).
use_cases: Check if an identified species is supported by the downstream tool

helper_functions.name: csv2map
helper_functions.description: Reads a 2-line CSV file and returns a key-value map.
use_cases: Convert a two-line CSV output into a Groovy map object

helper_functions.name: flattenPath
helper_functions.description: Extracts basename from a full file path.
use_cases: Get the simple file name from a long absolute or relative path

helper_functions.name: logHeader
helper_functions.description: Generates a formatted log header with workflow metadata and a custom message.
use_cases: Print a standard formatted header string to the Nextflow log console

helper_functions.name: getTrimmedReads
helper_functions.description: Retrieves trimmed FASTQ files based on 'trimming-riscd' and 'cmp', validating against allowed accessions (1PP).
use_cases: Fetch trimmed FASTQ files for downstream processing steps

helper_functions.name: getAssembly
helper_functions.description: Retrieves assembly FASTA files based on 'cmp' and 'riscd', supporting denovo, import, and mapping accessions.
use_cases: Fetch assembled FASTA files for typing, annotation, or multi-sample steps

helper_functions.name: getDepletedReads
helper_functions.description: Retrieves host-depleted reads based on 'cmp' and 'riscd' (1PP_hostdepl).
use_cases: Fetch reads that have had host contamination removed by Bowtie

helper_functions.name: getReferenceCodes
helper_functions.description: Extracts a list of reference codes from the 'references' parameter.
use_cases: Get a list of all reference codes provided in the workflow parameters

helper_functions.name: getNCBICodes
helper_functions.description: Parses NCBI codes from a string or list parameter.
use_cases: Extract NCBI accession numbers from parameter inputs

helper_functions.name: getReferences
helper_functions.description: Retrieves reference files (FASTA or GenBank) keyed by DS, handling multiple references.
use_cases: Fetch all reference files required for a specific sample DS (e.g. for segmented mapping)

helper_functions.name: getReference
helper_functions.description: Retrieves a single reference file (FASTA or GenBank) keyed by DS.
use_cases: Fetch the primary reference file for a specific sample

helper_functions.name: getReferenceUnkeyed
helper_functions.description: Retrieves a single reference file without the DS cross-reference key.
use_cases: Fetch a global reference file that is not tied to a specific sample ID

helper_functions.name: getReferenceOptional
helper_functions.description: Retrieves a reference file if available, otherwise returns an empty file placeholder.
use_cases: Fetch a reference file if provided, otherwise fail gracefully with an empty file placeholder

helper_functions.name: getHost
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'host' parameter, keyed by DS.
use_cases: Get the host name assigned to a specific sample dataset

helper_functions.name: getGenusSpecies
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'genus_species' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Get the taxonomy (genus and species) assigned to a sample

helper_functions.name: getModule
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'module' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Determine which analytical module or template to run for a sample

helper_functions.name: getAbricateDatabase
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'abricate_database' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Get the specific Abricate database requested for a sample

helper_functions.name: getBlastDatabase
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'blast_database' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Get the specific BLAST database to use for a sample

helper_functions.name: getParamTaxaId
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'taxaid' parameter value.
use_cases: Fetch the Taxonomic ID parameter from the workflow options

helper_functions.name: _getParamAsValue
helper_functions.description: Internal helper to retrieve a parameter value with optional default and security checks.
use_cases: Safely read a workflow parameter and supply a fallback if it is missing

helper_functions.name: _getParam
helper_functions.description: Internal helper to retrieve parameters, optionally crossing them with RISCD DS keys.
use_cases: Fetch a parameter and securely associate it with a specific sample ID

helper_functions.name: getDS
helper_functions.description: Extracts the DS component from the global RISCD parameter.
use_cases: Extract the sample dataset ID prefix from the current global RISCD string

helper_functions.name: isFullOutput
helper_functions.description: Checks if the 'full_output' or 'fullOutput' parameter is enabled.
use_cases: Check if the user requested detailed output files to be published

helper_functions.name: getResult
helper_functions.description: Core function to retrieve results from specific workflow steps (raw, assembly, genes, AMR, etc.) based on CMP, RISCD, and file patterns.
use_cases: Dynamically fetch channel outputs from a previous workflow step based on a file pattern

helper_functions.name: getKrakenResults
helper_functions.description: Retrieves Kraken classification results (TSV/TXT).
use_cases: Fetch taxonomy reports generated by a previous Kraken step

helper_functions.name: getInput
helper_functions.description: Aggregates inputs defined in 'input' list or 'cmp'/'riscd' params using `getResult`.
use_cases: Collect all diverse input files needed for a process into a single channel

helper_functions.name: getVCFs
helper_functions.description: Retrieves VCF input files matching standard patterns.
use_cases: Fetch variant calling format files for multi-sample aggregation tools

helper_functions.name: hasEnoughFastqData
helper_functions.description: Validates if FASTQ files exceed a defined 'raw_reads_threshold'.
use_cases: Ensure there is enough sequencing data present to proceed with analysis

helper_functions.name: hasFastqData
helper_functions.description: Checks if FASTQ files contain any processable reads (non-zero size).
use_cases: Prevent downstream processes from failing on completely empty FASTQ files

helper_functions.name: param
helper_functions.description: Retrieves a mandatory parameter value.
use_cases: Fail the workflow cleanly if a required parameter is not set by the user

helper_functions.name: optional
helper_functions.description: Retrieves an optional parameter value (returns empty string if missing).
use_cases: Safely read a parameter that might not be provided without crashing

helper_functions.name: optionalOrDefault
helper_functions.description: Retrieves an optional parameter value with a fallback default.
use_cases: Read a parameter, falling back to a specific default value if it is absent

helper_functions.name: isIonTorrent
helper_functions.description: Checks if input reads are Ion Torrent data based on 'seq_type' or header detection.
use_cases: Determine if the current reads are from Ion Torrent to route logic appropriately

helper_functions.name: isNanopore
helper_functions.description: Checks if input reads are Nanopore data based on 'seq_type' or header detection.
use_cases: Determine if the current reads are ONT long reads to route logic

helper_functions.name: isIlluminaPaired
helper_functions.description: Checks if input reads are Illumina Paired-End data.
use_cases: Determine if the current reads are standard Illumina paired-end data

helper_functions.name: isCompatibleWithSeqType
helper_functions.description: Validates if the provided reads match a list of allowed sequencing types.
use_cases: Prevent a specific tool from running on an unsupported sequencing read type

helper_functions.name: isSegmentedMapping
helper_functions.description: Determines if the current run is a segmented mapping workflow.
use_cases: Trigger specific aggregation logic meant only for multi-segment viruses

helper_functions.name: checkEnum
helper_functions.description: Validates if a value exists within a given Enum class.
use_cases: Ensure a string parameter strictly matches an allowed set of enumerated values

helper_functions.name: getHostReference
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the specific host reference FASTA from 'hosts_dir'.
use_cases: Fetch the specific host genome file required for read depletion processes

helper_functions.name: getLongReads
helper_functions.description: Retrieves long reads based on 'long_reads.cmp' and 'long_reads.riscd' parameters.
use_cases: Fetch long reads to be used in hybrid assembly or polishing steps

helper_functions.name: paramWrap
helper_functions.description: Wraps a mandatory parameter value into a string pattern (e.g., replaces {}).
use_cases: Format a mandatory command-line argument snippet for a tool script

helper_functions.name: optWrap
helper_functions.description: Wraps an optional parameter value into a string pattern if the parameter exists.
use_cases: Conditionally format a command-line argument snippet only if the parameter is set

helper_functions.name: _getReferences
helper_functions.description: Internal helper to retrieve multiple references, handling keying by DS and optionality.
use_cases: Abstract logic for fetching many reference files securely

helper_functions.name: _getSingleReference
helper_functions.description: Internal helper to retrieve a single reference file based on specific input map and type.
use_cases: Abstract logic for fetching one reference file safely and quickly

helper_functions.name: getHostOptional
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'host' parameter optionally, keyed by DS.
use_cases: Fetch a host parameter safely for steps where a host might not be requested

helper_functions.name: getHostUnkeyed
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'host' parameter without cross-referencing the DS key.
use_cases: Fetch a workflow-wide host parameter that applies to all samples

helper_functions.name: getGenusSpeciesOptionalUnkeyed
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'genus_species' optionally without cross-referencing the DS key.
use_cases: Fetch an optional workflow-wide taxonomy identifier safely

helper_functions.name: getGenusSpeciesOptional
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'genus_species' optionally, keyed by DS.
use_cases: Fetch sample-specific taxonomy safely when it might not be defined

helper_functions.name: getSpecies
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'species' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Fetch just the species name string for a specific sample

helper_functions.name: getBlastDatabaseUnkeyed
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'blast_database' parameter without cross-referencing the DS key.
use_cases: Fetch a workflow-wide BLAST database path

helper_functions.name: getKingdom
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'kingdom' parameter keyed by DS.
use_cases: Get the kingdom (e.g., Bacteria, Viruses) to configure annotation logic

helper_functions.name: getTaxIdsUnkeyed
helper_functions.description: Retrieves 'taxids' parameter without cross-referencing the DS key.
use_cases: Fetch global taxonomic IDs that apply to the whole run

helper_functions.name: getParamIncludeParents
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'include-parents' parameter value.
use_cases: Check if parent taxa should be included in reporting steps

helper_functions.name: getParamIncludeChildren
helper_functions.description: Retrieves the 'include-children' parameter value.
use_cases: Check if child taxa should be included in reporting steps

helper_functions.name: _getAlleles
helper_functions.description: Internal helper to retrieve allele results based on schema and RISCD.
use_cases: Abstract logic to fetch cgMLST allele calls for multi-sample clustering

helper_functions.name: getParam
helper_functions.description: Public wrapper for `_getParam` to retrieve arbitrary parameters.
use_cases: Dynamically fetch any parameter by string name

helper_functions.name: getInputOf
helper_functions.description: Aggregates inputs matching a specific file pattern from the input list or single RISCD.
use_cases: Fetch all inputs matching a specific extension from a complex channel

helper_functions.name: getInputFolders
helper_functions.description: Aggregates input folders (no specific file pattern) from the input list or single RISCD.
use_cases: Fetch output directories from previous tools to use for batch processing steps

helper_functions.name: getSingleInput
helper_functions.description: Retrieves a single input result based on current 'cmp' and 'riscd' params.
use_cases: Fetch one specific file directly from the previous execution step
